{{Quote|Now, I challenge you to the Contest.|Kenta Anwa, to Dannen Lifehold|<ref name="BF" />}}
'''Kenta Anwa''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Silika]]. He once challenged [[Dannen Lifehold]] to the [[Contest]], a drinking game. However, Lifehold was not affected by the [[Silika water]], it had a much stronger affect on Anwa's species. Anwa was propelled by the defeat of [[Kemmel Attapi]] against Lifehold. He wagered a thousand-[[Credit chip/Legends|credit chip]]. After several mugs he fell on the floor, losing the Contest and his wager.<ref name="BF" />

*{{JournalCite|1|Breaking Free: The Adventures of Dannen Lifehold}} {{1st}}
